name: forloop string iteration
description: Demonstrates iterating over a string using the FOR action values list.

tasks.name: initialize word
tasks.description: Prepare the variable that will accumulate the generated word.

tasks.name: loop letters
tasks.description: Iterate over each character in the literal FLOWK string.

tasks.name: print current letter
tasks.description: Log the active letter for the current iteration.

tasks.name: append letter to word
tasks.description: Append the active letter to the flow scoped variable.

tasks.name: print final word
tasks.description: Display the final word produced by the loop.
